global_description: A small, plump songbird with a compact body and a short tail. It features a warm brown upper body and a lighter, buff-colored underbelly. The bird has a distinctive white eyebrow stripe above its eye and a slightly curved bill.

part_details.eyebrow_stripe: Distinctive white line above the eye

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye
The short tail extends from the rear
The slightly curved bill protrudes from the face
